N.description: Quantity of different types of resources

Y.description: The quantity of resource j that is accessible.

A.description: The quantity of electrical energy generated from trial i

I.description: Resource j quantity needed for experiment i.

j1.description: Part 1 of variable j: The frequency at which each experiment is performed.

j2.description: Part 2 of variable j: The frequency at which each experiment is performed.

constraints.description: For each resource, the total amount required across all experiments does not exceed the available amount.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(quicksum(I[k][i] * (j1[i] + j2[i]) for i in range(M)) <= Y[k] for k in range(N))

objective.description: Increase the overall electrical output by conducting the experiments to their full potential.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(quicksum((j1[i] + j2[i]) * A[i] for i in range(M)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
